message:
fix(resize_scheduler): fix 3 test failures from scheduler logic bugs

- complete_active: don't clear active_seq on stale rejection, allowing
  cancel_active_if_superseded to still detect and properly cancel it
- aging_credit_capped_at_max: use incrementing seq numbers (submit_intent
  requires monotonically increasing seqs per pane)
- pending_is_dropped_after_excessive_deferrals: complete pane 2's active
  slot before each new submission so pane 1 keeps getting deferred

All 102 resize_scheduler tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
